description_long: A male maintenance worker is depicted standing upright, wearing a pair of light blue denim overalls over a plain white t-shirt. The overalls feature classic shoulder straps, a front chest pocket, and side pockets, with the pant legs extending down to gray work shoes. His hair is short and dark, and his arms are relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, hanging by his sides. The outfit is simple and functional, with no visible logos, badges, or safety equipment. The overall appearance suggests a worker ready for general maintenance or repair tasks in an urban environment.
description: A male maintenance worker in light blue overalls and a white t-shirt, standing upright with arms relaxed, wearing gray work shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the worker's face, white t-shirt, blue overalls with chest pocket, and gray shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the side seam of the overalls, and the relaxed arm posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the overalls with crossed straps and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the overalls and the worker's profile.
attribute_uniform_type: light blue denim overalls with a plain white t-shirt and gray work shoes
